title: Minecraft: The World Before
description: The official 'The World Before' modpack from Nyula51's Minecraft Project. This modpack offers a gigantic graphical overhaul for Minecraft Java Edition. It also adds a ton of useful mods for your vanilla-friendly gameplay experience.
body:
![The World Before Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac1d303dc083e2e852dfc8d68856cac50e490e4.jpeg)
### Explore Minecraft like never before with the new modpack, Minecraft: The World Before.
### 
This **modpack** brings you a version of Minecraft with a **major graphical overhaul**.
Minecraft is more **beautiful** than ever with **numerous mods** that **overhaul world generation.**
**New animals** and **items** are added to enhance your game while keeping it **vanilla-friendly**.
**Realistic physics** offer a transformative **gaming experience**.
**Minecraft comes alive** with the new, more **interactive villagers** and **overhauled villages**.
Experience many more **animations** that **enhance your character** and **the world** in which their story is told.
With **shaders** and a **realistic resource pack**, your game looks **stunning** and more **realistic**.
**Overhauled dungeons**, **temples**, and **more** make you feel like a **real explorer**.
###

<details>
<summary>Mods not available on Modrinth (1) </summary>

- [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica) created by [masady](https://www.curseforge.com/members/masady)

- To play this mod, you need to download it from CurseForge because it's currently only available there.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Optional Mods (1) </summary>

- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) created by [jeseibel](https://modrinth.com/user/jeseibel)

- This mod is optional because it requires some knowledge to get it working in a useful and visually appealing way. If you are interested in playing this modpack with Distant Horizons, please familiarize yourself with this mod and check the compatibility of other mods and shaders. If you want to play the modpack with the Distant Horizons mod, you need to add the mod yourself because it is not included in the current modpack version. Remember to download the mod for the correct Fabric and Minecraft versions.

</details>
